items.issue: Workspace stack section still says '-d/--dev (build the 5 repo-backed services)' but this PR adds the gateway as a 6th repo-backed service and updates the same count to 6 in scripts/stack/lib/flags.sh
items.fix: Change 'the 5 repo-backed services' to 'the 6 repo-backed services' in the Workspace stack section to match flags.sh and run-stack.sh

items.issue: New start-gateway target is not listed in .PHONY, unlike its siblings start-frontend/start-backend/start-admin; a file or directory named start-gateway at the workspace root would silently turn the target into a no-op
items.fix: Add start-gateway to the .PHONY line alongside the other start-* targets

items.issue: Usage example comment still says 'build the 5 repo-backed services from local source' but the PR adds a 6th repo-backed service (gateway) and updates the count to 6 at line 38 and in scripts/stack/lib/flags.sh usage text
items.fix: Change '5 repo-backed services' to '6 repo-backed services' in the run-stack.sh -d example comment on line 12

items.issue: The --dev caveat added by this PR lumps gateway in with stub/reference-data as 'Dockerfiles only have an AS development stage... A dev-run stage in those repos would unlock that', but the gateway Dockerfile created under this same ticket already has an AS dev-run stage (Maven + source, line 46); it is dev.compose.yml targeting 'development' with no source mount that prevents hot-reload
items.fix: Reword to note gateway already has a dev-run stage but dev.compose.yml does not use it yet, or wire dev.compose.yml to target dev-run with a src volume like the backend

items.issue: Gateway service environment block has no AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_CONNECTION_STRING / AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_QUEUE pass-through, so the container is locked to the dummy local-profile defaults and the stack cannot be pointed at the real TST namespace for the ticket's manual connectivity testing without editing the file
items.fix: Add value-less pass-through entries '- AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_CONNECTION_STRING' and '- AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_QUEUE' to the environment list; when unset on the host they are omitted and the local-profile defaults still apply

items.issue: Gateway is wired to 'target: development' (pre-built JAR, no source mount) even though the gateway Dockerfile in this ticket's PR set provides a 'dev-run' stage built for source-mounted live recompile; the stage is left unreachable, the new service gets no --dev source-pickup loop, and the PR's own AGENTS.md edit (which claims the gateway only has an 'AS development' stage) is made inaccurate
items.fix: Wire the gateway like the backend: 'target: dev-run' plus volume '../../repos/trade-imports-dynamics-gateway/src:/app/src' (and correct the AGENTS.md hot-reload note), or drop the unused dev-run stage from the gateway Dockerfile if 'development' is the deliberate choice
